message:
Merge pull request #33 from kubestellar/fix/oauth-version-info

🐛 Fix OAuth redirect URL and add version info to login

files.patch:
@@ -21,14 +21,18 @@ FROM node:20-alpine AS frontend-builder
 
 WORKDIR /app
 
+# Build arg for commit hash
+ARG COMMIT_HASH=unknown
+
 # Copy package files
 COPY web/package*.json ./
 RUN npm ci
 
 # Copy source
 COPY web/ ./
 
-# Build
+# Build with commit hash
+ENV VITE_COMMIT_HASH=${COMMIT_HASH}
 RUN npm run build
 
 # Final stage

@@ -94,6 +94,13 @@ export function Login() { className="absolute inset-0" /> + + {/* Version info - bottom right */} +
+ + v{__APP_VERSION__} ({__COMMIT_HASH__.substring(0, 7)}) + +
) }
